head.hi: Minister Powell to the Secretary of State.

opener.dateline:
Amreican Legation,
Port au Prince, March 21, 1905.

div.p: (Mr. Powell reports that Syrians, naturalized citizens of the United States, are not included in the order of expulsion; that he has instructed American citizens to close their stores on April 1 in order to prevent danger from the populace, who may pillage and set fire to the houses of our citizens. All quiet at the present moment.)
